channel.title: Homepage on 侍歌猪蹄
channel.description: Recent content in Homepage on 侍歌猪蹄

item.title: A Love Story Told by a Cat (0)
item.description: 我是一只猫，家就住在一所校园，听别的猫说，校园坐落在一座岛上，我对此将信将疑——我是一只宅猫，很少向他们一样到处闲逛，除了最近几个月，这也和我将要讲的故事有关。

item.title: About Me
item.description: 我打算写一个有关于猫的故事。 泪眼问花花不语，乱红飞过秋千去。

item.title: Another Note on A blogdown Tutorial
item.description: I just discovered an awesome tutorial on blogdown written by Alison. I have to admit this is the best blogdown tutorial I have seen so far.

item.title: A Quick Note on Two Beautiful Websites
item.description: To me, the two most impressive websites based on blogdown are: Rob J Hyndman’s personal website. Live Free or Dichotomize by Lucy and Nick et al. I’m sure there will be more.

item.title: Guidance
item.description: ROS ROS wiki ROS 教程 博客 GWH Blog XT的技术博客 wykxwyc’s Blog 实验室主页 苏黎世联邦理工学院的Autonomous System Lab 明尼苏达大学的Multiple Autonomous Robotic Systems Laboratory（MARS） 慕尼黑工业大学的The Computer Vision Group 香港科技大学的Aerial Robotics Group 相关课程 Prof. Dr. Cyrill Stachniss Mobile Sensing and Robotics I Mobile Sensing and Robotics II 3D Coordinate Systems Techniques for Self-Driving Cars 基础知识 鸟哥的Linux私房菜：基础学习篇 第四版 C++ CS106B Programming Abstractions Java mcatin CS61B Latex
